definition: A male or female attendant who serves customers at their tables in a restaurant, café or similar.
example: Waiter! There's a fly in my soup.
exampleVi: Phục vụ nam! Có một con ruồi trong súp của tôi.

definition: A female attendant who serves customers in a restaurant, café, or similar.
example: We need to understand the concept of waitress.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm phục vụ bàn.

definition: The details of the food to be served at a banquet; a bill of fare.
example: We need to understand the concept of menu.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về thực đơn.

definition: Arrangement, disposition, or sequence.
example: We need to understand the concept of order.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trật tự.

definition: Any of various bladed or pointed hand weapons, originally designating an Anglo-Saxon sword, and later a weapon of infantry, especially in the 14th and 15th centuries, commonly consisting of a broad, heavy, double-edged, hook-shaped blade, with a short pike at the back and another at the top, attached to the end of a long staff.
example: We need to understand the concept of bill.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hóa đơn.

definition: The act of receiving, or the fact of having been received.
example: A balance payable on receipt of the goods.
exampleVi: Số dư thanh toán khi nhận hàng.

definition: The tip of the external ear.
example: We need to understand the concept of tip.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tiền boa.

definition: Furniture with a top surface to accommodate a variety of uses.
example: We need to understand the concept of table.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bảng.

definition: The act of reserving, withholding or keeping back.
example: The committee authorised the reservation of funds.
exampleVi: Ủy ban đã cho phép dự trữ tiền.

definition: The presiding cook in the kitchen of a large household.
example: We need to understand the concept of chef.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đầu bếp.

definition: A room or area for preparing food.
example: We need to understand the concept of kitchen.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bếp.

definition: A vessel such as a plate for holding or serving food, often flat with a depressed region in the middle.
example: We need to understand the concept of dish.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về món ăn.

definition: Food that is prepared and eaten, usually at a specific time, and usually in a comparatively large quantity (as opposed to a snack).
example: Breakfast is the morning meal, lunch is the noon meal, and dinner, or supper, is the evening meal.
exampleVi: Bữa sáng là bữa sáng, bữa trưa là bữa trưa và bữa tối hay bữa tối là bữa tối.

definition: A sweet confection served as the last course of a meal
example: We need to understand the concept of dessert.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về món tráng miệng.

definition: A small, light, and usually savory first course in a meal
example: We need to understand the concept of appetizer.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm món khai vị.

definition: A liquid to consume; a drink, such as tea, coffee, liquor, beer, milk, juice, or soft drinks, usually excluding water.
example: We need to understand the concept of beverage.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đồ uống.

definition: An act of being of assistance to someone.
example: I say I did him a service by ending our relationship – now he can freely pursue his career.
exampleVi: Tôi nói rằng tôi đã giúp ích cho anh ấy bằng cách chấm dứt mối quan hệ của chúng tôi - giờ anh ấy có thể tự do theo đuổi sự nghiệp của mình.

definition: A patron, a client; one who purchases or receives a product or service from a business or merchant, or intends to do so.
example: Every person who passes by is a potential customer.
exampleVi: Mỗi người đi ngang qua đều là khách hàng tiềm năng.

definition: Dinnertime
example: We need to understand the concept of dine.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bữa ăn tối.

definition: A counter or sideboard from which food and drinks are served or may be bought.
example: We need to understand the concept of buffet.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm buffet.

definition: One which receives or entertains a guest, socially, commercially, or officially.
example: A good host is always considerate of the guest’s needs.
exampleVi: Một chủ nhà tốt luôn quan tâm đến nhu cầu của khách.

definition: A female host.
example: The host and hostess greeted their guests at the door.
exampleVi: Ông chủ và bà chủ đón khách ở cửa.

definition: The act of conveying something.
example: The delivery was completed by four.
exampleVi: Việc giao hàng đã được hoàn thành bởi bốn.

definition: Food purchased from a takeaway.
example: We need to understand the concept of takeout.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm mang đi.

definition: A connoisseur in eating and drinking; someone who takes their food seriously.
example: We need to understand the concept of gourmet.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm người sành ăn.

definition: Pleasing to taste; tasty.
example: We need to understand the concept of delicious.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm ngon.

definition: Something used to enhance the flavor of food; for example, salt or pepper.
example: We need to understand the concept of condiment.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm gia vị.

definition: A formula for preparing or using a medicine; a prescription; also, a medicine prepared from such instructions.
example: We need to understand the concept of recipe.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về công thức.

definition: A bill; a commercial document issued by a seller to a buyer indicating the products, quantities and agreed prices for products or services that the seller has already provided the buyer with. An invoice indicates that, unless paid in advance, payment is due by the buyer to the seller, according to the agreed terms.
example: We need to understand the concept of invoice.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hóa đơn.

definition: To provide, particularly:
example: We need to understand the concept of catering.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm phục vụ ăn uống.

definition: The act of reserving, withholding or keeping back.
example: The committee authorised the reservation of funds.
exampleVi: Ủy ban đã cho phép dự trữ tiền.

definition: A serviette; a (usually rectangular) piece of cloth or paper used at the table for wiping the mouth and hands for cleanliness while eating.
example: We need to understand the concept of napkin.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khăn ăn.

definition: A large celebratory meal; a feast.
example: We need to understand the concept of banquet.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tiệc.

definition: The member of staff at a restaurant who keeps the wine cellar and advises the guests on a choice of wines; a wine steward / stewardess, a wine waiter / waitress / server.
example: The sommelier recommended the perfect wine, opened the bottle with panache, and served it into glasses.
exampleVi: Người phục vụ rượu đã giới thiệu loại rượu hoàn hảo, mở chai một cách phô trương và phục vụ nó vào ly.

definition: An instrument or device for domestic use, especially in the kitchen.
example: We have convenient storage for all the kitchen utensils.
exampleVi: Chúng tôi có nơi lưu trữ thuận tiện cho tất cả các dụng cụ nhà bếp.

definition: A small restaurant.
example: We need to understand the concept of bistro.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bistro.

definition: A tray for serving foods.
example: We need to understand the concept of platter.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đĩa.

definition: A collective ensemble of eating and serving utensils such as knives, forks and spoons.
example: We need to understand the concept of cutlery.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm dao kéo.

definition: (French Canada) A smaller dish served before the main course of a meal.
example: We need to understand the concept of entree.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm entree.

definition: Someone who starts something.
example: a starter on a journey
exampleVi: sự khởi đầu của một cuộc hành trình

definition: A grating; a grid of wire or a sheet of material with a pattern of holes or slots, usually used to protect something while allowing the passage of air and liquids. Typical uses: to allow air through a fan while preventing fingers or objects from passing; to allow people to talk to somebody, while preventing attack.
example: We need to understand the concept of grill.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về món nướng.

definition: The act of providing approval and support; backing; championship.
example: His vigorous patronage of the conservatives got him in trouble with progressives.
exampleVi: Sự bảo trợ mạnh mẽ của ông đối với những người bảo thủ đã khiến ông gặp rắc rối với những người cấp tiến.
